title: HeatingCoil
description: HeatingCoil: Heating coils allow fluids (air) to raise their temperature as they pass through the coil

SensibleCapacity.description: Sensible capacity indicates the ability for the heating coil to change the temperature of the fluid (air).

EnteringDryBulbAirTemperature.description: Entering Dry Bulb Air Temperature indicates the heat intensity of the air entering the system in degrees Celsius

LeavingDryBulbAirTemperature.description: Leaving Dry Bulb Air Temperature indicates the heat intensity of the air leaving the system in degrees Celsius

EnteringWaterTemperature.description: Entering Water Temperature indicates the heat intensity of the water entering the system in degrees Celsius

LeavingWaterTemperature.description: Leaving Water Temperature indicates the heat intensity of the water leaving the system in degrees Celsius

PressureDrop.description: Pressure Drop indicates the amount of resistance created by the coil which creates a loss in pressure of the fluid (air)

NumberOfRows.description: Number of Rows indicates the number of rows of coils that the fluid (air) passes through

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
